playground.description: Write, run, and experiment with code in real-time.

python.name: Python
python.description: Learn Python from basics to problem solving.

python-basics.name: Python Basics
python-basics.description: Start with syntax, variables, and control flow.

python-vars-note.title: Python Variables
python-vars-note.content:
Python variables are created when you assign a value.

Examples:
name = 'CodeSpire'
age = 2
active = True

loops.name: Loops
loops.description: Practice for loops and while loops.

python-loops-note.title: Python Loops
python-loops-note.content:
Use for loops to iterate over ranges and lists.

Example:
for i in range(5):
    print(i)

questions.question: Which keyword is used for a loop over a range in Python?
questions.explanation: Python uses the for keyword to iterate over ranges, lists, and other iterables.

questions.question: Which clause filters rows in SQL?
questions.explanation: WHERE is used to filter rows before grouping or ordering.
